inputs.reasoning: Alternation (kInstAlt) with repetition forces the arg==0 and arg==1 cases in the switch statement at line 185-186, exercising the alternation branching logic.

Multiple sequential captures exercise the capture register path and Push operations for each capture group.
Multiple consecutive repetitions exercise the main loop in TrySearch and the CheckAndLoop label logic.
Multi-way alternation exercises kInstAltMatch and the greedy/non-greedy branching at lines 200-202.
